# ANALYSIS: BEAR_ONLY_OBSERVATION_ACCUMULATION

**Filed:** 2026-05-31  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** watcher_proposal  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Continuing to accumulate bear-only observations for the V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher will eventually meet the OP-21 promotion gate (N≥100, WR≥55%) and allow the gate to be ratified. The watcher is already deployed per OP-22 and logging bear-only observations; we need to sustain the observation count and win rate threshold.

## Mechanism

The V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher (updated 2026-05-21) excludes the bull v14e branch and accumulates bear-only observations. We will monitor the watcher-observations.jsonl file for new bear-only entries, tracking N and WR. No engine changes are required; this is a passive accumulation phase.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** The watcher-only change does not affect position sizing or account requirements. Underlying V14E bear trades would require $25K+ for full qty=28 (per OP-20 disclosure 1 in leaderboard for similar candidates).
2. **Sample bias:** We are accumulating new bear-only observations starting from the watcher deployment (2026-05-21). Current raw bear obs total N=241 (as of 2026-05-21) but we are counting new obs post-deployment. Overfit risk is low as we are observing only, not changing parameters.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (we are accumulating live observations; OOS validation will be considered post-accumulation if needed for promotion, but the gate is based on live observation count and WR).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (the watcher logs observations; real-fills validation for the underlying trade class is separate and not required for this watcher gate promotion).
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: a string of losses could lower WR; max drawdown in observation P&L; blow-up scenario: if the watcher misfires and accumulates incorrect observations (mitigated by code review and gym validators).
6. **Concentration:** We are accumulating observations over time; concentration will be monitored. If top-5 days become too dominant (>80% of P&L), we may need to adjust, but the gate is on overall WR and N.

## Pre-merge gate

Gym validators must pass for the watcher code. No walk-forward or real-fills required for the watcher gate promotion (OP-21 gate is based on live observation count and WR).

## Confidence

8 / 10 -- Based on existing raw bear observations showing WR=58.5% and deduped WR=55.1%, we are confident that accumulating more observations will maintain or improve the WR toward the 55% threshold.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis supports candidate #3 (V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE) and does not conflict with any other candidates. It is complementary to the goal of promoting candidate #3.
